testcase.name: Accessibility › Keyboard Navigation › should support full keyboard navigation
Accessibility › Keyboard Navigation › should handle Shift+Tab for reverse navigation

error.message: Tearing down "context" exceeded the test timeout of 60000ms.

testcase.error:

Tearing down "context" exceeded the test timeout of 60000ms.

Accessibility › Responsive Accessibility › should be accessible on mobile devices
Accessibility › Responsive Accessibility › should be accessible on tablets
Accessibility › Performance › Fast enough for accessibility › should respond quickly to keyboard input

testcase.name: Accessibility › Performance › Fast enough for accessibility › should not have unnecessary animations
Network Mocking › API Response Mocking › should handle slow API responses gracefully
Network Mocking › API Response Mocking › should display cost when mocked
Network Mocking › API Response Mocking › should handle model unavailability
Network Mocking › Error State Mocking › should show user-friendly error on 500
Network Mocking › Error State Mocking › should show user-friendly error on 403
Network Mocking › Error State Mocking › should handle network failures
Network Mocking › Error State Mocking › should handle timeout errors
Network Mocking › Request Modification › should log outgoing requests
Network Mocking › Request Modification › should verify request payload structure
Navigation and API › Root Navigation › should have working root endpoint
Navigation and API › Root Navigation › should have working health endpoint
Navigation and API › Root Navigation › should have working ready endpoint
Navigation and API › Root Navigation › should have working UI endpoint
Navigation and API › Root Navigation › should have docs endpoint
Navigation and API › API Endpoints › should return model defaults
Navigation and API › API Endpoints › should accept query run estimates
Navigation and API › API Endpoints › should accept query runs
Navigation and API › API Error Handling › should handle 404 gracefully
Navigation and API › API Error Handling › should handle malformed requests
Quorum-AI Workspace › should load the workspace page with all expected elements
Quorum-AI Workspace › Question Input › should allow typing questions
Quorum-AI Workspace › Question Input › should handle very long questions
Quorum-AI Workspace › Question Input › Keyboard Shortcuts › should accept Ctrl+Enter for submission
Quorum-AI Workspace › Question Input › Keyboard Shortcuts › should accept Cmd+Enter on Mac for submission
Quorum-AI Workspace › Theme Functionality › should toggle between light and dark themes
Quorum-AI Workspace › Theme Functionality › should have proper contrast in both themes
Quorum-AI Workspace › Cost Estimation › should display cost estimates
Quorum-AI Workspace › Cost Estimation › should show cost info tooltip
Quorum-AI Workspace › Error Handling › should display error banner when errors occur
Quorum-AI Workspace › Error Handling › should dismiss error banners
